title: callitriche minima
intro: Callitriche minima, also known as least waterwort, is a small, aquatic plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Callitriche minima include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
